description:
Smart. Focused. Email.

Fast, cross-platform email designed to filter out the noise - so you can focus on what's important.
Spark now uses a more secure connection for Microsoft 365, Outlook, and Hotmail accounts, with one sign-in for email and calendar.
Already use a Microsoft account? Just sign in again when Spark asks. It takes a few seconds.
We also fixed a bug that made emails and inbox views slow to open on large mailboxes.
Share your feedback at support@sparkmailapp.com
